arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news amid Odegaard absence ahead of Southampton clash
arts.sum: The influential Arsenal skipper missed the North London Derby win due to an ankle injury sustained during the international break. It's been a good start to the season for Arsenal who are also still going strong in the Carabao Cup. Arteta's team travel to Preston in the next round on October 30.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Bukayo Saka among 'best in the world' after legend's doubts come to light
arts.sum: Arsenal are in fine form ahead of their meeting with Premier League strugglers Southampton this weekend after putting PSG to the sword in the Champions League in midweek
Arsenal has been home to some of the greatest passers in football history over the years.

arts.ttl: Gabriel and William Saliba have formed the Thames Barrier, writes MARTIN KEOWN... They possess the same 'over our dead bodies' attitude that the great Arsenal defences I played in had
arts.sum: In the past, teams that played beautiful football, as Arsenal do now, weren't so concerned about set-plays. But Mikel Arteta 's side pride themselves on them.

arts.ttl: The New Saints frustrate Italian giants Fiorentina for 65 minutes in David vs Goliath European Conference League tie
arts.sum: Welsh Premier side TNS did themselves proud in their first of six Europa Conference League group fixtures, nearly embarrassing a Serie A side more used to playing clubs like Juventus and AC Milan

arts.ttl: Antonio Rüdiger calls Arsenal star to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Antonio Rüdiger has named a member of the defensive ranks at Premier League giants Arsenal as the one player he would bring to Spain’s capital, if afforded…

arts.ttl: UECL | Fiorentina 2-0 The New Saints: Adli and Kean break newcomers
arts.sum: Fiorentina were again wasteful, but eventually wore The New Saints down for a 2-0 Conference...

arts.ttl: Everything spotted in Arsenal training for Southampton amid double injury update
arts.sum: Following what has occurred in the last 72 hours, it is perhaps no surprise that Tomiyasu was pictured in Arsenal training but that Timber was nowhere to be seen. With three fixtures arriving in quick succession, Mikel Arteta has tinkered with his starting XI, which has allowed Ethan Nwaneri and others to shine, though injuries have made that far from straightforward.

arts.ttl: Arteta has already solved Timber Arsenal issue amid Mikel Merino decision
arts.sum: He's been out for a year and he's played a lot of minutes, probably more minutes than we would have wanted in the past few weeks and we have to manage him." Timber was already covering for White at right-back and now Arteta may need to find a replacement for him to face Southampton. During Tuesday's clash against PSG, Timber was withdrawn at half time with Arteta revealing after the game it was because of a possible injury .

arts.ttl: Palladino explains big Fiorentina changes against The New Saints
arts.sum: Raffaele Palladino explains the big changes to the Fiorentina tactical shape for the Conference League...
